videos.headline: JMU coach expects a tough game against Villanova
videos.description: Mike Houston expects his James Madison team to continue growing against Villanova as the Dukes try to push their record to 6-0.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Interview (JMU coach expects a tough game against Villanova) 2017/10/14 CGD
